name: Backyard's Ranch Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 pound bacon, cooked & drained, diced small
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans overnight.
2. Cook until tender and drain.
3. In a saucepan, simmer the remaining ingredients over medium heat until onions are clear, about 15-20 minutes.
4. Add cooked beans and simmer for an additional 20-30 minutes.
5. Salt to taste.
This makes a big pot of beans. Recipe can be halved or quartered.
